_meta.purpose: Computes the ROGUE signal for unknown-device triage. Pivots the Security detection alerts (.alerts-security.alerts-*) by host.name into one summary doc per host: alert_count, max_risk_score, max_severity, last_alert, and the set of firing rule names. The m_26_14-asset-triage-classify pipeline enriches against this summary (via the m_26_14-host-alert-lookup enrich policy) so an unmanaged asset with correlated high-severity alerts is routed 'rogue' from REAL detections rather than a seeded flag. host.name MUST be keyword on the dest index (see m_26_14-asset-triage index template) for the enrich match to work.
_meta.dependency_order: Run before m_26_14-asset-triage-classify. Execute the m_26_14-host-alert-lookup enrich AFTER this transform has populated the dest index.
_meta.on_cluster_validation: The transform service principal needs read access to .alerts-security.alerts-default (Security alerts data). If the alias is not visible, point source.index at .internal.alerts-security.alerts-default-* or grant 'read' on the alerts index to the transform role.

scripted_metric.reduce_script: Set out = new HashSet(); for (a in states) { if (a != null) { out.addAll(a); } } return new ArrayList(out);
Set out = new HashSet(); for (a in states) { if (a != null) { out.addAll(a); } } return new ArrayList(out);
